title: JeffersonWM site-wide save and Millionfold/Auth checkpoint
content:
This checkpoint closes out the latest cross-site pass before the next repo-wide save. The main thread focused on publishing readiness: keeping the public homepage list accurate, tightening Millionfold's route back into Auth, preserving build marker files, and recording the broader visual/public-surface work that came in from the side chat.

What changed:

  • JeffersonWM Home: Bullion is off the public homepage list for now, Millionfold is back at v0.1.5, and the shared lion background treatment remains in place.
  • Feed: the title-click reset and 5% lion-pattern background are included in the saved build, along with the related v0.2.2 release seed.
  • Battalion: the public landing, login/register, and dashboard surfaces now use the new illustrated background treatment, with softer public feed-row striping.
  • Millionfold/Auth: Millionfold's logged-in Dashboard link now opens https://auth.jeffersonwm.com/home directly, Auth has Millionfold listed as an app membership option, and short known usernames like wm are allowed by the auth username validator.
  • Build markers: Auth now includes dummyauth and Millionfold now includes dummymillionfold from their public build folders, so future builds keep the FTP marker files visible.

Verification completed: the JeffersonWM root build passed across Battalion, Perihelion, Bullion, Feed, Lionship, JeffersonWM Home, and Vermilion. Millionfold and Auth were also rebuilt successfully after their follow-up changes.
